title: lobelia splendens var. ignea
intro: Lobelia splendens var. ignea, also known as Lobelia or Indian tobacco, is a plant species that belongs to the Lobeliaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Lobelia contains medicinal properties such as lobeline, which is known to have expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues like bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used externally as a poultice or ointment for topical applications.
